description: Configure a new active external laboratory provider in LibreHealth EHR (Credentials: admin/password). Use the following configuration: Name: LabCorp Diagnostics, NPI: 1234567893, Sending Application ID: LIBREEHR, Sending Facility ID: CLINIC01, Receiving Application ID: LABCORP, Receiving Facility ID: LC7890, Protocol: DL, Remote Host: sftp.labcorp-example.com, Results/Orders Path: /home/results, and Lab Director: Dr. Sarah Chen.
